101010000000101100100111111100011101 - ASI: 19

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  100 = 1 * 00
  0000 = 00 * 00
  0101 = 01 * 01
  1101 = 11 * 01
  1111 = 11 * 11
  10001 = 100 * 01
  10011 = 100 * 11
  10101 = 1 * 0101
  000101 = 00 * 0101
  000101100 = 000101 * 100
  100011101 = 10001 * 1101
  100111111 = 10011 * 1111
  101010000 = 10101 * 0000
  100111111100011101 = 100111111 * 100011101
  101010000000101100 = 101010000 * 000101100
  101010000000101100100111111100011101 = 101010000000101100 * 100111111100011101
